app.name: Stardew Social
config.language.name: Language
config.language.tooltip: Enter your prefered language and alphabet. However English is the best supported.
config.showSocialImageTags.name: Show Social Image Tags
config.showSocialImageTags.tooltip: Shows saved image tag text above attached images in StardewSocial posts.
config.showUnreadComment.name: Show Unread Comment
config.showUnreadComment.tooltip: Shows unread comment count on posts.
config.aiSettings.name: AI Settings
config.aiSettings.tooltip: API key, model choice, and limits setting.
config.storageLimits.name: Storage and Limits
config.advanceSettings.name: Advance - Custom API
config.advanceSettings.tooltip: Call to your own API endpoint. Check out Forum for instruction.
config.aiSettings.description: These settings are only effective when an API key is provided. You can use your own OpenAI or Gemini key. When using custom API, key and model options here have no effect.
config.key.name: Key
config.key.tooltip:
Use your own OpenAI or Gemini key to remove shared usage limits.
OpenAI key: https://platform.openai.com/account/api-keys
Gemini key: https://aistudio.google.com/app/apikey
Restart the game after changing this value.
config.model.name: Model
config.model.tooltip:
Chooses the model.
Of course if you using OpenAI key, you should choose OpenAI model and vice versa for Gemini key.
config.activity.name: StardewSocial activity
config.activity.tooltip: Controls how often StardewSocial posts and engagement are generated.
config.characteristic.name: NPC characteristic detail
config.characteristic.tooltip:
NPC characteristic give the AI a background for each NPC during the chat and the post generation.
Higher detail improves quality but uses more tokens per NPC.
config.betterQualityComment.name: High quality comment
config.betterQualityComment.tooltip:
If enabled, AI will be provided with the minimal characteristic detail for each NPC.
This may improve the quality of comments but will use more tokens.
config.maxPosts.name: StardewSocial posts to keep
config.maxPosts.tooltip: Older posts are removed first when this limit is exceeded.
config.maxPhotos.name: Player photos to keep
config.maxPhotos.tooltip: Older player photos are deleted first.
config.advanceSettings.description: When using this advance setting, key and model selection on regular AI setting will be override. See mod page for instruction how to use these settings.
config.customEndpoint.name: Custom API Endpoint
config.customEndpoint.tooltip: URL endpoint for a custom API (leave empty to use default providers).
config.customKey.name: Custom API Key
config.customKey.tooltip: Key for your custom API endpoint.
config.customKeyHeader.name: Custom API Key Header
config.customKeyHeader.tooltip: HTTP Header name for the API Key.
config.customKeyPrefix.name: Custom API Key Prefix
config.customPayload.name: Custom API Payload Template
config.customResponsePath.name: Custom API Response JSON Path
config.customResponsePath.tooltip: JSON path to extract response text.
config.customTimeout.name: Custom API Timeout Seconds
ai.error.badRequest: Bad request sent to AI provider.
ai.error.unsupportedRegion: Country, region, or territory not supported.
ai.error.limitExceeded: Please try again in a few minutes. If not work, then total AI usage for all players has passed the limit set by OpenAI. This will be reset the next day in timezone UTC+0
ai.error.serverError: Server Error: The server had an issue while processing your request. Please try again.
ai.error.serverOverload: Server Overload: The server is experiencing high traffic. Please try again later.
notification.tagged: {{author}} has tagged you in a comment.
notification.commentedDouble: {{author1}} and {{author2}} has commented on your post.
notification.commentedMultiple: {{author1}}, {{author2}} and others has commented on your post.
